message:
feat(docs): web/gRPC parity map vs axum/tower-http/tonic/hyper (2oh2u.5.1)

41 gaps across web framework, middleware, gRPC, HTTP transport,
and WebSocket surfaces. Includes migration blocker classification,
Asupersync-specific extensions, and 4-phase execution order.
21 contract tests validate document structure and coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,373 @@
+# Web Framework, Middleware, and gRPC Parity Map
+
+**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.5.1` ([T5.1])
+**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
+**Date**: 2026-03-03
+**Dependencies**: T1.3.c (roadmap baseline)
+**Purpose**: Capability-level parity map for high-level application-stack ergonomics and production behaviors versus axum, warp, tower-http, and tonic. Covers migration blockers and ownership boundaries per module.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Scope
+
+This map covers 4 Tokio-ecosystem surfaces against 4 Asupersync module groups:
+
+| Tokio Crate | Asupersync Module | LOC | Status |
+|-------------|-------------------|-----|--------|
+| axum (router, extractors, responses) | `src/web/` | ~4,882 | Active |
+| tower-http (middleware layers) | `src/service/`, `src/web/middleware.rs` | ~5,353 + 875 | Active |
+| tonic (gRPC client/server) | `src/grpc/` | ~6,750 | Active |
+| hyper (HTTP transport) | `src/http/` | ~22,831 | Active |
+
+**Total application-stack LOC**: ~40,691
+
+---
+
+## 2. Web Framework Parity (vs axum)
+
+### 2.1 Router
+
+| axum Feature | Asupersync | Location | Status | Gap ID |
+|-------------|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
+| `Router::new()` | `Router::new()` | `web/router.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `.route("/path", method_router)` | `.route("/path", get(h).post(h))` | `web/router.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `.nest("/prefix", router)` | `.nest("/prefix", routes)` | `web/router.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `.merge(router)` | — | — | Missing | WEB-G1 |
+| `.layer(middleware)` | `.layer(middleware)` via MiddlewareStack | `web/middleware.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `.with_state(state)` | `State<T>` extractor | `web/extract.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `.fallback(handler)` | — | — | Missing | WEB-G2 |
+| Method routing (get/post/put/delete/patch/head/options) | All 7 methods | `web/router.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Path parameters (`:id`) | `Path<T>` extractor | `web/extract.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Wildcard routes (`*path`) | — | — | Missing | WEB-G3 |
+| Route ordering / priority | — | — | Missing | WEB-G4 |
+
+### 2.2 Extractors
+
+| axum Extractor | Asupersync | Status | Gap ID |
+|---------------|-----------|--------|--------|
+| `Path<T>` | `Path<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `Query<T>` | `Query<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `Json<T>` | `Json<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `Form<T>` | `Form<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `State<T>` | `State<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `Extension<T>` | `Extensions` | Complete | — |
+| `RawBody` / `Bytes` | `RawBody` | Complete | — |
+| `HeaderMap` / `TypedHeader` | — | Missing | WEB-G5 |
+| `ConnectInfo<T>` | — | Missing | WEB-G6 |
+| `MatchedPath` | — | Missing | WEB-G7 |
+| `OriginalUri` | — | Missing | WEB-G7 |
+| `Host` | — | Missing | WEB-G7 |
+| `Multipart` | — | Missing | WEB-G8 |
+| `WebSocketUpgrade` | Separate module | `net/websocket/` | Partial | WEB-G9 |
+| `FromRequestParts` trait | — | Missing | WEB-G10 |
+| Rejection types | — | Missing | WEB-G11 |
+
+### 2.3 Responses
+
+| axum Response | Asupersync | Status | Gap ID |
+|--------------|-----------|--------|--------|
+| `IntoResponse` trait | `IntoResponse` trait | Complete | — |
+| `StatusCode` | `StatusCode` | Complete | — |
+| `Json<T>` response | `Json<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `Html<T>` | `Html<T>` | Complete | — |
+| `Redirect` | `Redirect` | Complete | — |
+| Tuple responses `(StatusCode, body)` | Tuple responses | Complete | — |
+| `Sse` (Server-Sent Events) | — | Missing | WEB-G12 |
+| `Response<Body>` builder | — | Missing | WEB-G13 |
+| `AppendHeaders` | — | Missing | WEB-G14 |
+
+---
+
+## 3. Middleware Parity (vs tower-http)
+
+### 3.1 Service Trait
+
+| tower Feature | Asupersync | Location | Status | Gap ID |
+|--------------|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
+| `Service<Request>` trait | `Service<Request>` + `AsupersyncService` | `service/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `Layer` trait | `Layer` trait | `service/layer.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `ServiceBuilder` | `ServiceBuilder` | `service/builder.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `ServiceExt` (ready, oneshot) | `ServiceExt` | `service/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Tower adapter (bidirectional) | `TowerAdapter` / `AsupersyncAdapter` | `service/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+
+### 3.2 Middleware Layers
+
+| tower-http Layer | Asupersync | Location | Status | Gap ID |
+|-----------------|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
+| `TimeoutLayer` | `TimeoutLayer` | `service/timeout.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `RateLimitLayer` | `RateLimitLayer` | `service/rate_limit.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `ConcurrencyLimitLayer` | `ConcurrencyLimitLayer` | `service/concurrency_limit.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `LoadShedLayer` | `LoadShedLayer` | `service/load_shed.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `RetryLayer` | `RetryLayer` | `service/retry.rs` | Complete | — |
+| `CompressionLayer` | Compression in `http/compress.rs` | `http/compress.rs` | Partial | MW-G1 |
+| `DecompressionLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G1 |
+| `CorsLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G2 |
+| `TraceLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G3 |
+| `PropagateHeaderLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G4 |
+| `SetRequestHeaderLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G4 |
+| `SetResponseHeaderLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G4 |
+| `AddAuthorizationLayer` | `BearerAuthInterceptor` (gRPC) | `grpc/interceptor.rs` | Partial | MW-G5 |
+| `ValidateRequestHeaderLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G5 |
+| `NormalizePath` | — | — | Missing | MW-G6 |
+| `ServeDir` / `ServeFile` | — | — | Missing | MW-G7 |
+| `RequestBodyLimitLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G8 |
+| `CatchPanicLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G9 |
+| `MapResponseBodyLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G10 |
+| `MapRequestBodyLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G10 |
+| `FollowRedirectLayer` | — | — | Missing | MW-G11 |
+
+### 3.3 Combinator-Based Middleware (Asupersync-Specific)
+
+Asupersync's `web/middleware.rs` provides combinator-pattern middleware that integrates the resilience library:
+
+| Middleware | Purpose | tower-http Equivalent |
+|-----------|---------|----------------------|
+| `CircuitBreakerMiddleware` | Circuit breaker | None (external crate) |
+| `BulkheadMiddleware` | Concurrency isolation | None (manual pattern) |
+| `RetryMiddleware` | Retry with backoff | `RetryLayer` (similar) |
+| `RateLimitMiddleware` | Token bucket | `RateLimitLayer` (similar) |
+| `TimeoutMiddleware` | Deadline enforcement | `TimeoutLayer` (similar) |
+| `MiddlewareStack` | Composable builder | `ServiceBuilder` (similar) |
+
+---
+
+## 4. gRPC Parity (vs tonic)
+
+### 4.1 Server
+
+| tonic Feature | Asupersync | Location | Status | Gap ID |
+|--------------|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
+| `Server::builder()` | `ServerBuilder` | `grpc/server.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Service registration | Service dispatch | `grpc/server.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Unary RPC | `UnaryMethod` trait | `grpc/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Server streaming | `ServerStreamingMethod` | `grpc/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Client streaming | `ClientStreamingMethod` | `grpc/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Bidirectional streaming | `BidiStreamingMethod` | `grpc/service.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Health check service | `HealthService` | `grpc/health.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Interceptors | `InterceptorLayer` | `grpc/interceptor.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Metadata (headers) | `Metadata` | `grpc/streaming.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Max message size config | `ServerConfig` | `grpc/server.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Reflection service | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G1 |
+| TLS configuration | Via `tls/acceptor.rs` | — | Complete | — |
+| Graceful shutdown | Via `server/shutdown.rs` | — | Complete | — |
+| Compression (gzip) | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G2 |
+| Protobuf codegen (build.rs) | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G3 |
+| `#[tonic::async_trait]` macro | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G4 |
+
+### 4.2 Client
+
+| tonic Feature | Asupersync | Location | Status | Gap ID |
+|--------------|-----------|----------|--------|--------|
+| `Channel` (connection) | `Channel` / `ChannelBuilder` | `grpc/client.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Unary call | `GrpcClient` methods | `grpc/client.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Server streaming | `ResponseStream` | `grpc/client.rs` | Complete | — |
+| Client streaming | — | — | Partial | GRPC-G5 |
+| Bidirectional streaming | — | — | Partial | GRPC-G5 |
+| Load balancing | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G6 |
+| Connection pooling | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G7 |
+| Interceptors (client-side) | `FnInterceptor` | `grpc/interceptor.rs` | Partial | — |
+| Retry policy | — | — | Missing | GRPC-G8 |
+
+### 4.3 Protocol
+
+| Protocol Feature | Asupersync | Status | Gap ID |
+|-----------------|-----------|--------|--------|
+| gRPC frame format (1+4 byte prefix) | `GrpcCodec` | Complete | — |
+| Status codes (16 codes) | `Status` | Complete | — |
+| Deadline propagation (grpc-timeout) | — | Missing | GRPC-G9 |
+| Error details (google.rpc.Status) | — | Missing | GRPC-G10 |
+| Binary metadata encoding | — | Missing | GRPC-G11 |
+
+---
+
+## 5. HTTP Transport Parity (vs hyper)
+
+### 5.1 HTTP/1.1
+
+| Feature | Asupersync | Status |
+|---------|-----------|--------|
+| Request/response parsing | `http/h1/codec.rs` | Complete |
+| Chunked transfer encoding | `http/h1/codec.rs` | Complete |
+| Keep-alive | `http/h1/client.rs` | Complete |
+| Pipelining | `http/h1/client.rs` | Complete |
+| 100-continue | — | Missing (HT-G1) |
+| Upgrade (WebSocket) | `net/websocket/handshake.rs` | Complete |
+| Body streaming | `http/body.rs` | Complete |
+
+### 5.2 HTTP/2
+
+| Feature | Asupersync | Status |
+|---------|-----------|--------|
+| Stream multiplexing | `http/h2/stream.rs` | Complete |
+| HPACK compression | `http/h2/hpack.rs` | Complete |
+| Flow control | `http/h2/connection.rs` | Complete |
+| SETTINGS negotiation | `http/h2/settings.rs` | Complete |
+| PING/GOAWAY | `http/h2/frame.rs` | Complete |
+| RST_STREAM rate limiting | `http/h2/connection.rs` | Complete |
+| Server push | — | Missing (HT-G2) |
+| Priority/dependency | — | Missing (HT-G3) |
+
+### 5.3 Connection Pooling
+
+| Feature | Asupersync | Status |
+|---------|-----------|--------|
+| Per-host pooling | `http/pool.rs` | Complete |
+| Idle timeout eviction | `http/pool.rs` | Complete |
+| Health checks | `http/pool.rs` | Complete |
+| Per-host and global limits | `http/pool.rs` | Complete |
+
+---
+
+## 6. WebSocket Parity
+
+| Feature | Asupersync | Location | Status |
+|---------|-----------|----------|--------|
+| RFC 6455 frame protocol | `net/websocket/frame.rs` | Complete |
+| HTTP upgrade handshake | `net/websocket/handshake.rs` | Complete |
+| Close frame semantics | `net/websocket/close.rs` | Complete |
+| Read/write splitting | `net/websocket/split.rs` | Complete |
+| Client implementation | `net/websocket/client.rs` | Complete |
+| Server implementation | `net/websocket/server.rs` | Complete |
+| Per-message compression | — | Missing (WS-G1) |
+| Ping/pong auto-response | — | Missing (WS-G2) |
+
+---
+
+## 7. Migration Blocker Classification
+
+### 7.1 Hard Blockers
+
+| ID | Gap | Impact | Workaround |
+|----|-----|--------|------------|
+| WEB-G8 | Multipart form parsing | File upload endpoints broken | Manual parsing of multipart boundary |
+| MW-G2 | CORS middleware | Browser-facing APIs fail | Manual header insertion |
+| MW-G7 | Static file serving | Cannot serve frontend assets | External reverse proxy |
+| GRPC-G3 | Protobuf codegen | Must write service stubs manually | Manual trait implementation |
+| GRPC-G9 | Deadline propagation | gRPC timeout contracts not enforced | Manual timeout insertion |
+
+### 7.2 Soft Blockers
+
+| ID | Gap | Impact |
+|----|-----|--------|
+| WEB-G1 | Router merge | Cannot compose independently-developed routers |
+| WEB-G2 | Fallback handler | Unmatched routes return default 404 (may be acceptable) |
+| WEB-G12 | SSE support | Server-Sent Events endpoints broken |
+| MW-G1 | Compression/Decompression layers | Response size unoptimized |
+| MW-G3 | Trace layer | No structured request tracing out of box |
+| GRPC-G5 | Client-side streaming | Client streaming and bidi patterns limited |
+| GRPC-G6 | Load balancing | Single-server only |
+
+### 7.3 Non-Blocking
+
+| ID | Gap | Notes |
+|----|-----|-------|
+| WEB-G3 | Wildcard routes | Niche; most apps use named params |
+| WEB-G7 | MatchedPath/OriginalUri/Host | Diagnostic extractors |
+| MW-G6 | NormalizePath | Trailing slash handling |
+| MW-G9 | CatchPanic | Panic = abort in Asupersync |
+| HT-G2 | HTTP/2 server push | Deprecated by browsers |
+| HT-G3 | HTTP/2 priority | Largely ignored by implementations |
+
+---
+
+## 8. Asupersync-Specific Extensions (No Tokio Equivalent)
+
+| Feature | Location | Purpose |
+|---------|----------|---------|
+| Request-scoped regions | `web/request_region.rs` | Structured cleanup on disconnect |
+| `AsupersyncService` trait | `service/service.rs` | Cancel-aware service with `Cx` parameter |
+| `CircuitBreakerMiddleware` | `web/middleware.rs` | Built-in circuit breaker |
+| `BulkheadMiddleware` | `web/middleware.rs` | Built-in concurrency isolation |
+| Debug server | `web/debug.rs` | Introspection endpoints |
+| Next.js bootstrap | `web/nextjs_bootstrap.rs` | SSR integration |
+| Browser transport caps | `io/cap.rs` | WASM fetch/transport capabilities |
+| gRPC `HealthReporter` | `grpc/health.rs` | Dynamic health status updates |
+
+---
+

+
+**Total**: 41 gaps (7 High, 15 Medium, 19 Low)
+
+---
+
+## 10. Recommended Execution Order
+
+### Phase A: Hard Blockers (Weeks 1-3)
+
+1. **MW-G2**: CORS middleware — blocks all browser-facing APIs
+2. **MW-G7**: ServeDir/ServeFile — blocks frontend asset serving
+3. **WEB-G8**: Multipart form parsing — blocks file upload
+4. **WEB-G12**: SSE support — blocks real-time event endpoints
+5. **GRPC-G3**: Protobuf codegen — blocks ergonomic gRPC service definition
+6. **GRPC-G9**: Deadline propagation — blocks production gRPC correctness
+7. **GRPC-G5**: Client streaming completion — blocks streaming RPC patterns
+
+### Phase B: Ergonomics (Weeks 3-6)
+
+8. **WEB-G1/G2**: Router merge + fallback
+9. **WEB-G5/G10**: TypedHeader + FromRequestParts
+10. **MW-G1**: Compression/Decompression as layers
+11. **MW-G3**: TraceLayer for structured request tracing
+12. **MW-G5**: Auth validation layers
+13. **GRPC-G2/G7/G8**: Compression, pooling, retry for clients
+
+### Phase C: Production Polish (Weeks 6-8)
+
+14. Remaining medium gaps
+
+### Phase D: Nice-to-Have (Defer)
+
+15. Low-severity gaps as capacity allows
+
+---
+
+## 11. Revision History
+
+| Date | Author | Change |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| 2026-03-03 | SapphireHill | Initial parity map (v1.0) |
